name: Managing Catalogs: Bulk Imports & Exports
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Maropost Commerce Cloud provides advanced catalog management tools that help merchants handle large product datasets and structure categories and collections. The "},{"text":"Bulk Import/Export","bold":true},{"text":" feature allows you to upload or download large sets of product data at once for efficient catalog management."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Bulk Import","bold":true},{"text":" – Upload products, variants, pricing, or inventory using CSV/Excel templates."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Bulk Export","bold":true},{"text":" – Extract catalog data for reporting, auditing, backups, or external processing."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bulk Import (Step-by-Step Process)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To add multiple products to your store via CSV/Excel templates:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 1:","bold":true},{"text":" Navigate to "},{"text":"Back Office >> Products >> Import","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1WYGXCCJY7AG/b44398ad-438d-4f0a-a8c6-dca4cffd34ec.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1WYGXCCJY7AG/b44398ad-438d-4f0a-a8c6-dca4cffd34ec.png","name":"b44398ad-438d-4f0a-a8c6-dca4cffd34ec.png","type":"image/png","size":4002006,"width":2560,"height":1434,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F1WYGXCCJY7AG%2Fb44398ad-438d-4f0a-a8c6-dca4cffd34ec.png","active":true,"mediaID":1188,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:51:04+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 2:","bold":true},{"text":" Click on "},{"text":"Add File","bold":true},{"text":" to upload your CSV."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can use your own CSV file and map the columns later."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Or, download the "},{"text":"Product Sample Template.CSV","bold":true},{"text":" and fill it with your product data."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once the file is uploaded, click "},{"text":"Next","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Pro Tip: ","bold":true},{"text":"Start by exporting your current data, then modify or add new items. This is usually the easiest way to ensure your file matches the exact structure."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9FTR01BUAC05/74f7afb1-f95d-43af-8e1a-f3e5c12e20a0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9FTR01BUAC05/74f7afb1-f95d-43af-8e1a-f3e5c12e20a0.png","name":"74f7afb1-f95d-43af-8e1a-f3e5c12e20a0.png","type":"image/png","size":3857745,"width":2560,"height":1443,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F9FTR01BUAC05%2F74f7afb1-f95d-43af-8e1a-f3e5c12e20a0.png","active":true,"mediaID":1189,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:53:58+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Step 3:"},{"text":" Map the uploaded CSV columns to Maropost attributes (mandatory fields are marked with an asterisk *)."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The system will auto-map fields where possible."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Adjust mapping by selecting from the dropdown menus."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can also map custom product fields under "},{"text":"Available Custom Fields","bold":true},{"text":". (For details, see "},{"text":"Custom Fields","italic":true},{"text":" documentation.)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once mapping is complete, click "},{"text":"Next","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/76JUQBS6N6GT/8255ff7a-255a-4b3f-9429-5df57f8454d0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/76JUQBS6N6GT/8255ff7a-255a-4b3f-9429-5df57f8454d0.png","name":"8255ff7a-255a-4b3f-9429-5df57f8454d0.png","type":"image/png","size":497333,"width":2560,"height":1451,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F76JUQBS6N6GT%2F8255ff7a-255a-4b3f-9429-5df57f8454d0.png","active":true,"mediaID":1190,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:54:15+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Step 4:"},{"text":" Select "},{"text":"Content Update Options","bold":true},{"text":" and start the import."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Add New / Update Existing Record","bold":true},{"text":" – Creates new products or updates existing ones. If a SKU matches, the system updates the record; if not, it creates a new product."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Add New","bold":true},{"text":" – Creates new product records from your file."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Update Existing Record","bold":true},{"text":" – Updates details of products already in the system by matching SKUs.  "}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8D9DLHMX9POT/1d3fdb84-ad5d-4fa0-89ba-89458ea3fb40.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8D9DLHMX9POT/1d3fdb84-ad5d-4fa0-89ba-89458ea3fb40.png","name":"1d3fdb84-ad5d-4fa0-89ba-89458ea3fb40.png","type":"image/png","size":3860884,"width":2560,"height":1438,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F8D9DLHMX9POT%2F1d3fdb84-ad5d-4fa0-89ba-89458ea3fb40.png","active":true,"mediaID":1191,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:55:17+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Save Template (Optional)"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can choose to save the current import setup (Column mapping and update options) as a reusable "},{"text":"Import Template","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Give it a name (e.g., "},{"text":"ImportV1","italic":true},{"text":") so you can quickly run future imports without redoing the setup."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":" "}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LFU2VQVLGOA4/f79ddb05-655f-4d51-baea-6942bfea38b7.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LFU2VQVLGOA4/f79ddb05-655f-4d51-baea-6942bfea38b7.png","name":"f79ddb05-655f-4d51-baea-6942bfea38b7.png","type":"image/png","size":3848552,"width":2560,"height":1439,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FLFU2VQVLGOA4%2Ff79ddb05-655f-4d51-baea-6942bfea38b7.png","active":true,"mediaID":1192,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:55:42+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Step 5:"},{"text":" Click "},{"text":"Start Import","bold":true},{"text":". The system will begin processing your file."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You’ll see a notification when the upload is initiated, and another when it is completed."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once the process is complete, the notification will update to show "},{"text":"“Import Completed”","bold":true},{"text":" along with the completion time."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can view all status updates under the "},{"text":"Notification Centre","bold":true},{"text":" (bell icon), including success, errors, or percentage completion."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/19MEO036FHPM/54dd5dba-3805-4e45-960d-ddf396bdaf68.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/19MEO036FHPM/54dd5dba-3805-4e45-960d-ddf396bdaf68.png","name":"54dd5dba-3805-4e45-960d-ddf396bdaf68.png","type":"image/png","size":4131358,"width":2560,"height":1438,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F19MEO036FHPM%2F54dd5dba-3805-4e45-960d-ddf396bdaf68.png","active":true,"mediaID":1193,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:56:43+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once Export (Step-by-Step Process)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Maropost Commerce Cloud also allows you to export product data in bulk. This is useful for reporting, backups, auditing, or preparing data for external systems."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 1:","bold":true},{"text":" Navigate to "},{"text":"Back Office >> Products >> Export","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/19DUXQENMZ5A/0a64c667-65ac-46e2-9f1d-9070727b6518.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/19DUXQENMZ5A/0a64c667-65ac-46e2-9f1d-9070727b6518.png","name":"0a64c667-65ac-46e2-9f1d-9070727b6518.png","type":"image/png","size":4055857,"width":2560,"height":1443,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F19DUXQENMZ5A%2F0a64c667-65ac-46e2-9f1d-9070727b6518.png","active":true,"mediaID":1195,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:59:24+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Step 2:"},{"text":" Choose the products you want to export:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Current Page","bold":true},{"text":" – Exports only the products currently displayed on the screen."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"All Products","bold":true},{"text":" – Exports your entire product catalog."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Selected","bold":true},{"text":" – Exports only the products you’ve manually selected using checkboxes."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Products Matching Your Search","bold":true},{"text":" – Exports all products that match your current search or filter criteria."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can also specify a name for your export file under "},{"text":"Choose File
